Chat fallback is allowed when operator choice is explicit.'+sep)

record={'record_type':'bem590_finalize_operator_decision_format','cycle_id':'bem590-finalize-operator-decision-format','source':'gpt','status':'completed','canon':str(canon),'mailbox_to_claude':str(msg),'operator_choice':'1','selected_format':'short_readable_comparison_table','blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:37 (UTC+3)'}
